<answer>```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct UserData {
    uint64_t user_id;
    uint8_t age;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream(user_id, age, name);
    }
};

UserData deserialize_user_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a buffer adaptor from the input span using hexi::init_empty to initialize it as empty
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer, hexi::init_empty);
    
    // Create a binary stream object using the buffer adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    // Use the stream's deserialise method to deserialize the UserData object
    UserData user_data;
    stream.deserialise(user_data);
    
    // Return the deserialized UserData object
    return user_data;
}
```</answer>
